description: SST is a framework for building and deploying full-stack applications on your own infrastructure, with support for AWS, Cloudflare, and many other providers. It provides app infrastructure components and a developer workflow for local development and deployment.
summary: SST exposes a documented npm CLI (`sst`); no public HTTP, GraphQL, or MCP developer surface was found on sst.dev, and the CLI’s authentication mechanics for SST-owned credentials were not publicly documented on the pages found.
